title: GGUF Llama LLM Model Spec
description: GGUF model specification for Llama-family language models.
documentation:
## Purpose
Combines the GGUF backend tag with the Llama family tag, fully resolving the model to a GGUF Llama instruct model. The runtime uses this to apply both the correct file loading path and the Llama header_id chat template.

## When to use
This URN is assigned by the ValueAdapter after inspecting a GGUF model file and confirming it is a Llama-family model. Use it in cap selectors to match only GGUF Llama models.

## Notes
This is a composed tag produced at runtime; it is not typically specified manually by users.
